info.name: EduPath AI — Full API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for EduPath AI hackathon demo.

Setup:
1. Set `base_url` variable to `http://localhost:8000` (or deployed URL)
2. Run `python -m scripts.train_models` once to generate ML models
3. Start backend: `uvicorn app.main:app --reload`

All endpoints documented with example requests, expected responses, and edge-case tests.

variable.description: Change to deployed URL for production demo

request.description: Verifies backend is running, Groq key configured, and cache backend status.
Returns cache backend type (memory/redis) and live key count.
Interactive Swagger UI — open in browser.

item.name: 🎓 Loan Scoring
item.description: Education loan eligibility scoring using SMOTE + Optuna-tuned XGBoost/LightGBM + SHAP explainability.

request.description: Strong profile — should return Excellent/Low Risk with score 80+.

response.name: 200 OK — Excellent profile

request.description: Weak profile — should return Poor/High Risk with improvement suggestions.
Germany has highest country score (95) — near-zero tuition. Good for demo.
Should return 422 — GPA max is 4.0.

item.name: 📈 ROI Calculator
item.description: 10-year ROI projection with XGBoost salary prediction, EMI calculation, and break-even analysis.

request.description: expected_salary=0 uses XGBoost model prediction. Should show ~$115K starting salary.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Germany near-zero tuition → extremely high ROI. Great for judge demo.

item.name: 🚀 Career Simulator
item.description: 10-year salary projection + career demand index + skill roadmap. Biggest feature.

item.name: Simulate Career — ML Engineer USA (A+ Profile)

body.raw:
{
  "gpa": 3.9,
  "field_of_study": "AI / Machine Learning",
  "target_country": "USA",
  "work_experience_years": 2,
  "program_duration_years": 2,
  "annual_tuition_usd": 45000,
  "monthly_living_usd": 1500,
  "target_role": "ML Engineer",
  "skills_text": "Python, PyTorch, scikit-learn, AWS, Docker"
}

request.description: Should return A+ grade, demand_index 95, $130K starting salary, break-even ~2 years.

response.name: 200 OK — ML Engineer USA
response.body:
{
  "predicted_starting_salary": 131500,
  "salary_at_5yr": 178900,
  "salary_at_10yr": 243700,
  "total_investment": 126000,
  "break_even_years": 1.0,
  "ten_year_net": 1847600,
  "roi_percent": 1466.3,
  "demand_index": 95,
  "career_grade": "A+",
  "projections": [
    {"year": 1, "salary": 131500, "cumulative_earnings": 131500, "cumulative_cost": 126000, "net_position": 5500},
    {"year": 2, "salary": 142020, "cumulative_earnings": 273520, "cumulative_cost": 126000, "net_position": 147520}
  ],
  "top_skills_to_add": ["PyTorch", "LLM fine-tuning", "MLOps", "CUDA"],
  "summary": "As a ML Engineer in USA, you're projected to start at $131,500/yr, reaching $178,900 by year 5..."
}

item.name: Simulate Career — Data Scientist Germany (Best ROI)

request.description: Near-zero tuition → massive ROI despite lower salary. Good comparison for judges.

item.name: 🤖 Visa Interview Coach
item.description: LangChain + Groq (llama-3.3-70b) multi-turn visa coaching. Returns structured JSON with confidence scores.

item.name: Start Session — Why Study in USA?

request.description: intent=answer → visa officer mode. Returns confidence_score, strengths, weaknesses.

response.name: 200 OK — officer feedback
response.body:
{
  "message": "Specific program and career goal stated clearly. Strong start.",
  "confidence_score": 78,
  "strengths": ["specific institution named", "clear career goal"],
  "weaknesses": ["funding source not mentioned"],
  "suggested_improvement": "Mention who is funding your education and your plan to return home.",
  "tip": null,
  "topic_progress": 60,
  "is_topic_complete": false
}

request.description: Specific amounts + scholarship = should score 85+.
intent=help → coaching mode. Returns tip instead of score.
Clears conversation memory for a session.

item.name: 🏫 University Q&A (RAG)
item.description: FAISS + HuggingFace embeddings (local, no API key) + Groq LLM. RAG over 31 university/visa documents.

request.description: First call may take 5–10s (FAISS index builds once in memory). Subsequent calls cached.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Tests multi-document retrieval — Germany (820% ROI) vs USA (580% ROI) docs.
Should retrieve Fulbright-Nehru, DAAD, Chevening, Erasmus Mundus from RAG docs.

item.name: 🔬 Skill Gap Analyzer
item.description: NLP-based resume skill extraction + gap analysis for target role/country.

request.description: Should detect Python, Data Analysis, ML/AI, Cloud, SQL. Missing: Deep Learning, Spark.
Strong profile — should show minimal gaps.
Germany profile — should recommend C++, ROS, Embedded, AUTOSAR.
